summary: Completed backend + frontend validation for /program/create onboarding refresh (5-step order, card UI, dark mode readability, handle validation, payload compatibility, dashboard redirect).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py has multiple endpoints that return {"error": ...} with HTTP 200 instead of raising HTTPException with proper status codes (e.g., /api/profiles name validation, /api/rooms and /api/messages validations). Not blocking this onboarding change, but should be standardized.
test_credentials: MISSING: /app/memory/test_credentials.md was not found in workspace.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_* prefixed profile/program documents through public API during regression run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: On preview URL, onboarding flow works end-to-end with dev auth bypass (MOCKED auth user in preview mode). New backend regression test validates handle + Dil + hidden defaults (exam_goal=TYT, daily_hours=2-4) and program creation persistence.
rca of the issue: No blocking issue reproduced for this scope. Minor systemic code-quality issue observed: some validation branches in backend return HTTP 200 error payloads instead of structured 4xx responses.
